title: Soak Test - Headset disconnected, app in the background, phone idle
scenario: App remains responsive and does not crash after prolonged idle with headset disconnected on Home Screen
steps: 1. Install and launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Pair a Poly Bluetooth headset with the app.
4. Navigate to the Home screen (the headset should be shown as disconnected).
5. Put the app in the background and leave the phone idle for several hours.
6. After several hours, bring the app back to the foreground and check if it is still running and responsive.
expected: The app remains running and responsive after several hours in the background. No memory leaks or crashes occur.
